compiled_state.title: test-merge-conflict-regression.sh: code+ticket merge conflict review gate exits 0 instead of 1
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: CI Hook Tests failure. test_code_and_ticket_merge_conflict_requires_review expects the review gate to exit 1 (blocking) when both code and ticket files have merge conflicts, but the gate exits 0 (pass). The hook should require review for code file merge conflicts even when ticket files are also conflicted.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). severity=1, complexity=1, environment=1, intermittent=0. Gate 1a: skipped (no CLI_user tag, but auto-created bug — dispatching intent-search).
